title: The Bologna Charter on SME Policies
text: The Bologna Charter on SME Policies was adopted as a Declaration on 15 June 2000  on the occasion of the Bologna Conference for Ministers Responsible for SMEs and Industry Ministers on “Enhancing the Competitiveness of SMEs in the Global Economy: Strategies and Policies".  This Declaration provides an overarching framework for a holistic, horizontal approach to small and medium-sized enterprises (SME) policy making in the context of a globalised economy. It documents Adherents’ commitment to cooperate with each other and to take actions to foster SME development, in areas such as the business environment for SMEs, access to finance, innovation and public private partnerships and networking, among others.
